task_completion.description: Verify that placemarks for Tower A and Tower B have been created in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for pushpins on the map or entries in the 'Places' sidebar labeled 'Tower_A_Sugarloaf' and 'Tower_B_Flagstaff'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a path or measurement line connects the two tower locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a colored line connecting the two placemarks on the 3D map view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Elevation Profile tool has been activated and is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph pane at the bottom of the Google Earth window showing terrain elevation (red/green/blue graph area) with distance on the x-axis and elevation on the y-axis.

task_completion.description: Verify that the placemarks or path data was saved as a KML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save File' dialog, a file manager window showing 'microwave_link_analysis.kml', or a terminal command verifying the file's existence.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the elevation profile was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing 'los_profile.png' or an image viewer displaying the elevation profile screenshot.

task_completion.description: Verify the text report contains the correct distance, obstruction status, and max elevation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open text editor or terminal output displaying 'los_report.txt'. The content should show a distance of approximately 11-13 km, 'Obstruction: YES' (or similar affirmative), and a maximum elevation value (likely >2200m).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Google Earth Pro GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Google Earth Pro application window with the 3D map and tools, not just terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the report values appear derived from the tool rather than hallucinated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the text report (distance, elevation) should reasonably match any visible values shown in the Google Earth Elevation Profile or Measure tool in previous or current screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a web browser to search for the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show web searches for 'Sugarloaf to Flagstaff line of sight' or similar queries; the data must come from the desktop application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The distance between the specified coordinates (Tower A: 40.0258°N, 105.4286°W and Tower B: 39.9878°N, 105.2931°W) is approximately 12.2 km. The terrain analysis should indicate an obstruction (YES) due to the foothills. The maximum elevation along the path will be significantly higher than the start/end points, likely exceeding 2200m.
